summary: Comprehensive testing of Gallery CRM NEW features: Excel export (3 endpoints), PDF expertise export, Photo upload via Object Storage, WhatsApp customer links, Customer data encryption, and Capacitor config. All 15 backend tests passed. All UI features verified.
passed_tests: Login with demo@aslanbasoto.com / demo123 works correctly
GET /api/export/cars returns Excel file (200, spreadsheetml content-type, araclar.xlsx)
GET /api/export/customers returns Excel file (200, spreadsheetml content-type, musteriler.xlsx)
GET /api/export/transactions returns Excel file (200, spreadsheetml content-type, islemler.xlsx)
GET /api/export/expertise/{car_id} returns PDF for existing car (application/pdf, valid PDF header)
GET /api/export/expertise/{invalid_id} returns 404 for nonexistent car
POST /api/upload accepts image file upload and returns {id, path, filename}
POST /api/upload rejects non-image files (returns 400)
GET /api/files/{path} returns uploaded file with correct content
POST /api/encrypt-customer/{id} encrypts customer phone and notes (success: true)
POST /api/encrypt-customer/{invalid_id} returns 404 for nonexistent customer
WhatsApp link format correctly converts Turkish 0xxx to 90xxx
Capacitor config (capacitor.config.json) has correct structure and values
Export endpoints require authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
Inventory page: Excel export button visible and clickable
Customers page: Excel export button visible
Customers page: WhatsApp buttons present on customer cards with correct href (wa.me/90...)
Finance page: Excel export button visible in transactions section
Vehicle card dropdown: 'Ekspertiz PDF' option present
AddCarModal Photos tab: Upload button and drag-drop area visible
Settings page: KVKK account deletion section still works
critical_code_review_comments: Email verification is MOCKED - verification code returned directly in API response (by design for demo)
Object Storage integration uses real Emergent Object Storage (not mocked)
ENCRYPTION_KEY in backend/.env is empty - will auto-generate key at runtime (stored in logs). For production, set a persistent key.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ENCRYPT_Customer during encryption testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Excel export for cars/customers/transactions returns valid .xlsx files via openpyxl, 2) PDF expertise export via reportlab returns valid PDF with vehicle info and body part status, 3) Photo upload uses Emergent Object Storage (put_object/get_object), 4) WhatsApp links use wa.me/{phone} with Turkish format (0xxx -> 90xxx), 5) Customer encryption endpoint encrypts phone and notes using Fernet, 6) Capacitor config ready for native mobile build (com.aslanbasoto.crm). Backend has openpyxl, reportlab installed. Frontend uses fileAPI.upload() and exportAPI methods.
mocked_api_note: Email verification is MOCKED. Object Storage is REAL (Emergent integrations).
